_comment: Copy this file to my_private_profile.json and fill in your own data. my_private_profile.json is git-ignored and never leaves your machine. The onboarding agent can build this file for you from an existing resume or by interview.

work_history.title: Your Title
highlights: A concrete achievement with a real number or outcome.
Another bullet describing scope, stakeholders, and impact.

work_history.title: Your Earlier Title
highlights: What you owned and what changed because of you.

skills_customization._comment: Optional. If you want a specific skill family listed first (e.g. AI tools), put it here in order.

restricted_keywords._comment: Optional. Words to strip from your resume, and substitutions to apply.
